name: Sea Port: Controller
description: Play Seaport, a ship management and strategy simulation game! Take control of your ships in a city or island port and become a shipping tycoon! Ensure ships avoid collisions in the port and send ships that have finished their work in the port back on their voyages. Start now and strive to be the best in this game! If you enjoyed the game, please rate it!
instructions: Use the mouse or touch to draw a path for the ships to go to the port
